nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro Natural Titanium device frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 15 Pro - Natural Titanium.imageset/iPhone 15 Pro - Natural Titanium.png
nodes.description: iPhone 15 Pro device frame in Natural Titanium color. PNG with a transparent screen cutout. The bezel has a warm beige/natural titanium finish. Used in the Maya app for wrapping screen recordings with a natural titanium iPhone 15 Pro bezel overlay.
